# zabbix_host_interface (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix host interface.

~> **Note:** Multiple interfaces of the same type with `main = true` on the same host will cause a Zabbix API error at apply time. This constraint cannot be validated at plan time across multiple resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zabbix_host_group" "linux" {
  name = "Linux servers"
}

resource "zabbix_host" "web_server" {
  host           = "web-srv-01"
  host_group_ids = [zabbix_host_group.linux.id]
}

# Agent interface (default)
resource "zabbix_host_interface" "agent" {
  host_id = zabbix_host.web_server.id
  type    = "agent"
  use_ip  = true
  ip      = "192.168.1.10"
  dns     = ""
  port    = "10050"
  main    = true
}

# SNMPv2c interface
resource "zabbix_host_interface" "snmp_v2c" {
  host_id = zabbix_host.web_server.id
  type    = "snmp"
  use_ip  = true
  ip      = "192.168.1.10"
  dns     = ""
  port    = "161"
  main    = true

  snmp = {
    version   = "v2c"
    community = "public"
  }
}

# SNMPv3 interface
resource "zabbix_host_interface" "snmp_v3" {
  host_id = zabbix_host.web_server.id
  type    = "snmp"
  use_ip  = true
  ip      = "192.168.1.10"
  dns     = ""
  port    = "161"
  main    = false

  snmp = {
    version         = "v3"
    security_name   = "admin"
    security_level  = "authPriv"
    auth_protocol   = "sha256"
    auth_passphrase = "auth-secret"
    priv_protocol   = "aes128"
    priv_passphrase = "priv-secret"
  }
}

# IPMI interface
resource "zabbix_host_interface" "ipmi" {
  host_id = zabbix_host.web_server.id
  type    = "ipmi"
  use_ip  = true
  ip      = "192.168.1.10"
  dns     = ""
  port    = "623"
  main    = true
}

# JMX interface
resource "zabbix_host_interface" "jmx" {
  host_id = zabbix_host.web_server.id
  type    = "jmx"
  use_ip  = true
  ip      = "192.168.1.10"
  dns     = ""
  port    = "12345"
  main    = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the host this interface belongs to.
- `port` (String) Port used by the interface.
- `type` (String) Interface type. One of: `agent`, `snmp`, `ipmi`, `jmx`. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `dns` (String) DNS name of the interface. Required when `use_ip = false`.
- `ip` (String) IP address of the interface. Required when `use_ip = true`.
- `main` (Boolean) Whether this is the default interface of its type for the host. Defaults to `false`.
- `snmp` (Attributes) SNMP-specific settings. Required when `type = "snmp"`, must not be set for other types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--snmp))
- `use_ip` (Boolean) Whether to use the IP address (`true`) or DNS name (`false`) for monitoring. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the host interface.

<a id="nestedatt--snmp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `snmp`

Required:

- `version` (String) SNMP version. One of: `v1`, `v2c`, `v3`.

Optional:

- `auth_passphrase` (String, Sensitive) SNMPv3 authentication passphrase.
- `auth_protocol` (String) SNMPv3 authentication protocol. One of: `md5`, `sha1`, `sha224`, `sha256`, `sha384`, `sha512`. Defaults to `md5`.
- `bulk_requests` (Boolean) Whether to use bulk SNMP requests. Defaults to `true`.
- `community` (String) SNMP community string. Used for SNMPv1 and SNMPv2c.
- `context_name` (String) SNMPv3 context name.
- `priv_passphrase` (String, Sensitive) SNMPv3 privacy passphrase.
- `priv_protocol` (String) SNMPv3 privacy protocol. One of: `des`, `aes128`, `aes192`, `aes256`, `aes192c`, `aes256c`. Defaults to `des`.
- `security_level` (String) SNMPv3 security level. One of: `noAuthNoPriv`, `authNoPriv`, `authPriv`. Defaults to `noAuthNoPriv`.
- `security_name` (String) SNMPv3 security name.
